title: lithocarpus formosanus
intro: Lithocarpus formosanus, also known as the Taiwan Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family that is native to Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Lithocarpus formosanus is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating cough, and promoting digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Lithocarpus formosanus is often used in tea form or as a decoction, and it may also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
